auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to access your trade intelligence
auth.register_subtitle: Start exploring global trade opportunities for free
auth.check_email_desc: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click it to activate your account.
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

country.full_report_desc: Complete business plans, supplier contacts, ROI models.
country.ai_placeholder_country: Ask anything about trade opportunities in {{country}}.
country.ai_unavailable: Sorry, AI advisor unavailable right now.
country.see_opportunities_desc: Detailed report, scoring and AI business plans for {{country}}

farming.title: Opportunity Farming
farming.subtitle: Describe your product — our AI advisor identifies distribution channels, geographies and key opportunities worldwide.
farming.product_desc_placeholder: What does it do? What problem does it solve?
farming.opp_desc_placeholder: Which markets interest you? What constraints do you have?
farming.affiliate_helper: We will embed your link in all influencer recommendations generated for this product.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: From free market exploration to full AI-powered business plans. Scale as you grow.
pricing.credits_desc: The AI Advisor (business plan generation, briefs, action reports) consumes AI tokens. Each session is billed via an internal credit counter. Credits are rechargeable at any time. When your balance reaches {{threshold}}, a recharge prompt appears automatically.
pricing.credits_note: Recharges are available in your account. Included in the Strategy plan.
pricing.access_inactive: If your subscription lapses or payment fails, search history and opportunity sheets are hidden — they unlock as soon as payment is settled.
pricing.access_map: The map stops showing opportunities and action plans are inaccessible without an active subscription.
pricing.access_reactivate: Payment immediately reactivates all your data and features.
pricing.trial_note: Secure payments via Stripe. Cancel anytime.

account.title: My Account
account.upgrade_desc: AI business plans, Opportunity Farming, influencer network and more.

reports.title: Trade Reports
reports.subtitle: Country-by-country opportunity analysis powered by real trade data.
reports.n_countries: {{count}} countries analyzed — click any to view opportunities
reports.empty_desc: Data is being loaded from global trade sources

influencer.title: Influencer Space
influencer.subtitle: Choose offers, share your unique links, earn commissions.
influencer.no_links: No active links. Get your first link in the Offers tab.
influencer.create_profile_desc: Access affiliate offers, generate tracked links and receive commissions automatically. Access is free — the platform keeps 30% of generated commissions.

seller.title: Seller Space
seller.subtitle: Create affiliate offers. Platform influencers will promote them to their audience.
seller.no_offers_free: No offers created. Click on + New offer to get started.
seller.no_offers_locked: Upgrade to Strategy plan to create affiliate offers.
seller.paywall_desc: Creating affiliate offers is available from the Strategy plan (€99/month). Platform influencers will promote your products and generate tracked sales.
seller.split_note: The platform keeps 30% of the commission. The remaining 70% is automatically paid to influencers via Stripe Connect (D+7 after confirmed conversion).

gemini.title: Gemini AI
gemini.subtitle: Gemini 2.0 Flash · Google
gemini.welcome_desc: Ask anything — market analysis, commercial strategy, import/export opportunities, or general topics.
gemini.error: Connection error — check the Gemini API key.
suggestions: What are the most promising markets for agri-food in Africa?
How do I assess the potential of a new export market?
Explain the most commonly used Incoterms

home.hero_desc: Feel The Gap analyses global trade flows to identify under-supplied markets. AI, real data, actionable business plans.
home.cta_register_full: Sign up and get started for free →
home.features_title: From raw data to actionable opportunities
home.f1_desc: Visualise import/export gaps country by country. Identify where demand exceeds local supply.
home.f2_desc: Scan your product. AI identifies customer profiles, geographies and distribution channels.
home.f3_desc: From idea to action plan. Capex, Opex, ROI, recommended suppliers — all generated by AI in seconds.
home.f4_desc: Connect your products to qualified influencers. Tracked affiliate links, automatic payouts via Stripe.
home.cta_final_title: Ready to identify your next market?
home.cta_final_desc: Free registration. No credit card required.
